finish(result='`bundled_skills_dir()` in `src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py` returns the directory `kiss/agents/claude_skills` (relative to the kiss package). It\'s computed as `Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "claude_skills"` — i.e., the `claude_skills` directory that is a sibling of the `sorcar` package inside `src/kiss/agents/`.\n\nContent is downloaded into it by the script `scripts/fetch-claude-skills.sh`, which fetches the official Claude Code plugins (each plugin holding skills at `<plugin>/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`). The docstring notes the directory may be absent in development checkouts.')

[finish]: `bundled_skills_dir()` in `src/kiss/agents/sorcar/skills.py` returns the directory `kiss/agents/claude_skills` (relative to the kiss package). It's computed as `Path(__file__).resolve().parent.parent / "claude_skills"` — i.e., the `claude_skills` directory that is a sibling of the `sorcar` package inside `src/kiss/agents/`.

Content is downloaded into it by the script `scripts/fetch-claude-skills.sh`, which fetches the official Claude Code plugins (each plugin holding skills at `<plugin>/skills/<name>/SKILL.md`). The docstring notes the directory may be absent in development checkouts.
